query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT alunoId) as total_alunos_com_disc, COUNT(*) as total_resultados FROM disc_resultados; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT alunoId) as total_alunos_com_respostas FROM disc_respostas;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT alunoId) as total_alunos_com_disc, COUNT(*) as total_resultados FROM disc_resultados; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT alunoId) as total_alunos_com_respostas FROM disc_respostas;
